  • Method Details

    • createTrade

      public BookingCreateTradeRequestBuilder createTrade()
      Create Trade

      Creates a trade with one or more executions. Combination of (account_id, client_order_id, and the process_date (determined by Booking service)) determines the uniqueness of the trade.

      Upon successful submission, returns the created trade and its details including Booking service enriched details.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • createTrade

      public BookingCreateTradeResponse createTrade(String accountId, TradeCreate tradeCreate) throws Exception
      Create Trade

      Creates a trade with one or more executions. Combination of (account_id, client_order_id, and the process_date (determined by Booking service)) determines the uniqueness of the trade.

      Upon successful submission, returns the created trade and its details including Booking service enriched details.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeCreate - A Trade represents an entire order made by a client. Trades can hold one or many executions representing partial fills that aggregate into a whole order.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • createTrade

      public BookingCreateTradeResponse createTrade(String accountId, TradeCreate tradeCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Create Trade

      Creates a trade with one or more executions. Combination of (account_id, client_order_id, and the process_date (determined by Booking service)) determines the uniqueness of the trade.

      Upon successful submission, returns the created trade and its details including Booking service enriched details.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeCreate - A Trade represents an entire order made by a client. Trades can hold one or many executions representing partial fills that aggregate into a whole order.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • getTrade

      public BookingGetTradeRequestBuilder getTrade()
      Get Trade

      Gets a trade and all executions by trade_id.

      Upon successful submission, returns the trade details and all the execution by trade_id.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • getTrade

      public BookingGetTradeResponse getTrade(String accountId, String tradeId) throws Exception
      Get Trade

      Gets a trade and all executions by trade_id.

      Upon successful submission, returns the trade details and all the execution by trade_id.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • getTrade

      public BookingGetTradeResponse getTrade(String accountId, String tradeId, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Get Trade

      Gets a trade and all executions by trade_id.

      Upon successful submission, returns the trade details and all the execution by trade_id.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • completeTrade

      public BookingCompleteTradeRequestBuilder completeTrade()
      Complete Trade

      Complete a Trade by closing and generating any fees and withholdings if necessary. Once this endpoint returns an OK, the combination of details that generated the Trade (account_id, client_order_id, and the process_date) cannot be reused.

      Upon successful submission, returns completed trade details and all the executions. Trades that are left open will be automatically closed nightly before Ledger's EOD.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • completeTrade

      public BookingCompleteTradeResponse completeTrade(String accountId, String tradeId, CompleteTradeRequestCreate completeTradeRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Complete Trade

      Complete a Trade by closing and generating any fees and withholdings if necessary. Once this endpoint returns an OK, the combination of details that generated the Trade (account_id, client_order_id, and the process_date) cannot be reused.

      Upon successful submission, returns completed trade details and all the executions. Trades that are left open will be automatically closed nightly before Ledger's EOD.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      completeTradeRequestCreate - A request for completing a trade.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • completeTrade

      public BookingCompleteTradeResponse completeTrade(String accountId, String tradeId, CompleteTradeRequestCreate completeTradeRequestCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Complete Trade

      Complete a Trade by closing and generating any fees and withholdings if necessary. Once this endpoint returns an OK, the combination of details that generated the Trade (account_id, client_order_id, and the process_date) cannot be reused.

      Upon successful submission, returns completed trade details and all the executions. Trades that are left open will be automatically closed nightly before Ledger's EOD.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      completeTradeRequestCreate - A request for completing a trade.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • cancelTrade

      public BookingCancelTradeRequestBuilder cancelTrade()
      Cancel Trade

      Cancel a trade and all the executions using the original trade_id. CancelTrade will either cancel everything, or nothing at all if a failure occurs.

      Upon successful submission, returns an empty response.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • cancelTrade

      public BookingCancelTradeResponse cancelTrade(String accountId, String tradeId, CancelTradeRequestCreate cancelTradeRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Cancel Trade

      Cancel a trade and all the executions using the original trade_id. CancelTrade will either cancel everything, or nothing at all if a failure occurs.

      Upon successful submission, returns an empty response.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      cancelTradeRequestCreate - A request for canceling all executions underneath a trade.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • cancelTrade

      public BookingCancelTradeResponse cancelTrade(String accountId, String tradeId, CancelTradeRequestCreate cancelTradeRequestCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Cancel Trade

      Cancel a trade and all the executions using the original trade_id. CancelTrade will either cancel everything, or nothing at all if a failure occurs.

      Upon successful submission, returns an empty response.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      cancelTradeRequestCreate - A request for canceling all executions underneath a trade.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • rebookTrade

      public BookingRebookTradeRequestBuilder rebookTrade()
      Rebook Trade

      Rebook a trade by the original trade_id. The entire original trade's executions are rebooked using the executions provided in the request. If applicable, fees and backup withholdings will be re-calculated.

      Upon successful submission, returns the rebooked trade details and all the executions.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • rebookTrade

      public BookingRebookTradeResponse rebookTrade(String accountId, String tradeId, RebookTradeRequestCreate rebookTradeRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Rebook Trade

      Rebook a trade by the original trade_id. The entire original trade's executions are rebooked using the executions provided in the request. If applicable, fees and backup withholdings will be re-calculated.

      Upon successful submission, returns the rebooked trade details and all the executions.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      rebookTradeRequestCreate - Used to correct an entire fill of trades using the activity_id that is common to all of the trades in the request
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • rebookTrade

      public BookingRebookTradeResponse rebookTrade(String accountId, String tradeId, RebookTradeRequestCreate rebookTradeRequestCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Rebook Trade

      Rebook a trade by the original trade_id. The entire original trade's executions are rebooked using the executions provided in the request. If applicable, fees and backup withholdings will be re-calculated.

      Upon successful submission, returns the rebooked trade details and all the executions.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      rebookTradeRequestCreate - Used to correct an entire fill of trades using the activity_id that is common to all of the trades in the request
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • createExecution

      public BookingCreateExecutionRequestBuilder createExecution()
      Create Execution

      Create a new execution under an existing trade that is open.

      Upon successful submission, returns the created execution and its details.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • createExecution

      public BookingCreateExecutionResponse createExecution(String accountId, String tradeId, ExecutionCreate executionCreate) throws Exception
      Create Execution

      Create a new execution under an existing trade that is open.

      Upon successful submission, returns the created execution and its details.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      executionCreate - An execution represents a partial-fill or a fill that is part of an order. Executions are children to a Trade, which collectively represents an entire order made by a client.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • createExecution

      public BookingCreateExecutionResponse createExecution(String accountId, String tradeId, ExecutionCreate executionCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Create Execution

      Create a new execution under an existing trade that is open.

      Upon successful submission, returns the created execution and its details.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      executionCreate - An execution represents a partial-fill or a fill that is part of an order. Executions are children to a Trade, which collectively represents an entire order made by a client.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • getExecution

      public BookingGetExecutionRequestBuilder getExecution()
      Get Execution

      Gets an execution by execution_id.

      Upon successful submission, returns the execution details by execution_id.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • cancelExecution

      public BookingCancelExecutionRequestBuilder cancelExecution()
      Cancel Execution

      Cancel an execution using the original execution_id. If applicable, fees and backup withholdings will be re-calculated.

      Upon successful submission, returns the execution that was canceled.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • cancelExecution

      public BookingCancelExecutionResponse cancelExecution(String accountId, String tradeId, String executionId, CancelExecutionRequestCreate cancelExecutionRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Cancel Execution

      Cancel an execution using the original execution_id. If applicable, fees and backup withholdings will be re-calculated.

      Upon successful submission, returns the execution that was canceled.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      tradeId - The trade id.
      executionId - The execution id.
      cancelExecutionRequestCreate - A request for canceling a single execution.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • cancelExecution

      Upon successful submission, returns the execution that was canceled.

      Exception - if the API call fails
